feature.name: Business rules engine
feature.description: Extract VibeShop rules evaluation (conditions, actions, priority) as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: match field conditions with eq/gt/gte/in/contains operators
apply set/inc/append actions to facts mappings
evaluate rules in descending priority order
track evaluation count in GLOBAL_STATE registry
excluded_behaviors: CSV import pipeline and app factory clutter
original project tests and CLI entrypoints

entanglement.description: Correct rules evaluation lives behind duplicate helpers in utils.py and mutates GLOBAL_STATE counters during evaluation.
signals: three similarly named rules helpers with only one correct semantics
rules engine increments rules_evaluated in GLOBAL_STATE
conditions/actions split across modules with orchestration in engine.py

output.import: from featurelifted import Rule, RulesEngine, evaluate_rules
